title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Nimbus Post

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Nimbus Post
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!
